Modern edition · preserved source

T. S. Eliot Hypertext Project

BrowseSearchAbout

Reference

Articles on T.S. Eliot and his Works

Articles on

The articles on this page are divided into two groups; a first group which lists articles of less than six months old, listed by date of appearance, and a second group which lists older articles listed by author name. Other indexes, such as subject, date of appearance, title of magazine and title of article, will be made available at a later date. If you wish to make any additions, please send a mail to a.arum@wxs.nl, with as a subject title "Articles on Eliot." (as you can see, this page could use some additions). Finally, there is an 'on this site' section, which lists the larger texts behind the annotations to the various poems.

Arwin van Arum

Recent Articles

Constable, John
Article on "I. A. Richards, T S. Eliot and the Poetry of Belief"
Originally published in Essays in Criticism, 40/3 (July 1990), 222-243. This (shorter) version of the article has in more recent editions been replaced by a (longer) version.
Online at: http://www.btinternet.com/~j1837c/jbc/iartse.html 

Sloane, Patricia
"Pun and Games: A New Approach to Five Early Poems by T. S. Eliot"
Yeats Eliot Review, 16:1 (Summer 1999) pp. 2-20.
Earlier version read at Joint Meeting of T. S. Eliot Society and American Literature Association, Bahia Resort, San Diego, May 30, 1996. The article includes an outline of the voices speaking in the several parts of Eliot's The Waste Land.
Online at: http://world.std.com/~raparker/pub/pun_and_games.html

Sloane, Patricia.
Searching for a Statue of a Girl: Freud's "Delusion and Dream" and T. S. Eliot's "La Figlia che Piange."
The Modern Schoolman: A Quarterly Journal of Philosopohy,
LXXV:3 (March 1998) 237-250.

Older Articles

Mirsky, D.S. 
"Eliot and the End of Bourgeois Poetry"
translated from French (originally Russian?)
("T.S. Eliot et la Fin de la Poesie Bourgeoise")

Woolf, Leonard.
"'Jug Jug' to Dirty Ears."
Nation and Athenaeum,
5 December 1925, vol. xxxviii, 354.

On This Site

van Arum, Arwin.
"The Serious Artist."
Synopsis: this article presents an overview of Pound's critical ideas that will serve as a point of reference for other Pound related observations on this site (q.v.). It is strongly based on the critical articles collected by T.S. Eliot in Literary Essays of Ezra Pound. Faber & Faber: London, 1954.
